---
title: Donate
description: Support the Infinite Canvas project
---

# Donate

If this project helps you, consider supporting its continued maintenance through donations, starring, or providing AI subscription accounts.

Project development relies heavily on AI coding tools like Codex and Claude for writing code, debugging, and organizing documentation. These tools require ongoing payment. Your donations will primarily fund AI development tools, model services, and project maintenance resources to help the project keep iterating.

## Ways to Support

Support methods include but are not limited to:

- Star the GitHub repository to help more people discover it.
- Financial donations to support AI tool subscriptions, model services, and project maintenance costs.
- AI coding tool subscription accounts (Codex, Claude, etc.) to help maintainers continue using AI-assisted development.
